LanguageData.WB_DrinkedGiver_Herbaltea.stages.0.label: drinked giver's herbal tea
LanguageData.WB_DrinkedGiver_Herbaltea.stages.0.descr: I dranked delicious tea. I feel refreshed.
LanguageData.WB_DrinkedGiver_Milk.stages.0.label: drinked giver's milk.
LanguageData.WB_Ate_Giver_Meals.stages.0.label: ate giver's meals.
LanguageData.WB_Ate_Giver_Meals.stages.0.description: That was a very delicious dish. I want to eat that again.
LanguageData.WB_LaughingGiver.stages.0.label: giver laughing
LanguageData.WB_LaughingGiver.stages.0.description: My heart was healed by the laughing giver.
LanguageData.WB_LaughingMyGiver.stages.0.label: my giver laughing
LanguageData.WB_LaughingMyGiver.stages.0.description: My Giver, a paragon of adorableness, reigns supreme in the realm of cuteness!
LanguageData.WB_BeSnuggledByGiver.stages.0.label: giver was snuggling me
LanguageData.WB_BeSnuggledByGiver.stages.0.descriptio: Adorable giver snuggled up to me affectionately. It made my heart flutter.
LanguageData.WB_BeSnuggledByMyGiver.stages.0.label: my giver was snuggling me
LanguageData.WB_BeSnuggledByMyGiver.stages.0.descript: The lonely my giver came to me for affection again. With a beaming smile, I thought "Well, I can't help it" as I embraced her.
LanguageData.WB_BondedGiverDied.stages.0.label: my dear {0} died
LanguageData.WB_BondedGiverDied.stages.0.description: It's painful, so painful, so very painful...
